fixture: 012_simple_table_scan

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE metrics (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO metrics VALUES (1, 10)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO metrics VALUES (2, 20)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id, qty FROM metrics
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 10
      [1] 2 | 20

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT qty + 1 AS next_qty FROM metrics
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] next_qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 11
      [1] 21
